/free-seo-checklist.resourceSectionIntro: Prefer working in a spreadsheet? Download the Shopify or Wix version and use the same checklist offline.

resourceCards.title: Shopify SEO Checklist Spreadsheet
resourceCards.description: Offline version of the Shopify checklist with priority, effort, KPI, status, and notes columns.
resourceCards.label: Download Shopify XLSX

resourceCards.title: Wix SEO Checklist Spreadsheet
resourceCards.description: Offline version of the Wix checklist with the same execution columns used in the interactive board.
resourceCards.label: Download Wix XLSX
